results.title: Delta radiomics: an updated systematic review.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 39017760. 2024/08/01 00:00. BACKGROUND: Radiomics can provide quantitative features from medical imaging 
that can be correlated with various biological features and diverse clinical 
endpoints. Delta radiomics, on the other hand, consists in the analysis of 
feature variation at different acquisition time points, usually before and after 
therapy. The aim of this study was to provide a systematic review of the 
different delta radiomics approaches.
METHODS: Eligible articles were sea
